title: Create KioskSessionService with qrCode, visitor, face signals and reset()
acceptance_criteria: Service has signals: qrCode: signal<string | null>(null), visitor: signal<VisitorWithAccessDto | null>(null), face: signal<string | null>(null)
reset() method sets all three signals to null
Uses inject() function pattern, not constructor injection
No standalone: true in decorator (Angular 21 default)
completion_summary: Created KioskSessionService with qrCode/visitor/face signals and reset() method, providedIn root, inject() pattern, Angular 21 compliant
